한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

ETA: “dog lovers” could also be replaced with “uniformed, uneducated, and/or inconsiderate dog lovers” vs “informed, educated, and considerate dog lovers” if that makes you more comfortable 🫶 One of my biggest pet peeves is people baby talking to my dog and pretending like I’m interrupting? Bizarre! And in case you didn’t know because it’s something that’s been so normalized, putting your hands in dogs’ faces is unsafe. Dogs don’t need to sniff you up close like that and it’s putting unneeded pressure on them (often leading to bites). The best way to greet a dog is calm, neutral, and honestly just ignoring them. If you want to say hi to a dog, ask the owner first. Try to make yourself small by turning to the side and crouching. Allow the dog to approach you first. Some dogs are super friendly and love people! This doesn’t mean it’s ok to pet or approach without asking their handler! The safest way to greet any dog is by admiring from afar. Admittedly, if I know someone’s dog well, I might be a bit of the former “dog lover” and be excitedly greeting them 😂 It’s different when you know the dog! "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе

Холодные сливки взбиваем до мягких пиков, добавляем сгущенку, перемешиваем 2. В каждый пакетик кладем 5 плиток шоколада, затем опускаем их в горячую воду, чтобы шоколад растаял 3. Распределяем шоколад по всему пакету, раскрываем пакет, заливаем мороженое (либо с помощью кондитерского мешка, либо как у меня на видео) 4. Убираем на 3 часа в морозилку Готово! Unfortunately, sometimes things don’t work out the way we hope. Today I didn’t receive the test score I hoped for. While it’s devastating, discouraging, humiliating, and shattered my confidence.. it’s not the end of the world. I’d like to think there’s some odds behind the timing of  @Bailey Zimmerman releasing a song I’d sing as a child, ‘The Climb.’ “I can almost see it. This dream I’m dreaming. But there’s a voice inside my head saying “you’ll never reach it.”” “.. I gotta keep trying. Gotta keep my head held high. There’s always gonna be another mountain… sometimes I’m gonna have to lose.” The DAT is my current mountain, and it’s defeated me. The vulnerability to admit to being dissatisfied with my results is to show the honesty and reality of my journey. It’s not how I’d like for it to have gone, but it’s the story God has written for me! Maybe my failure was meant to inspire someone… it’s not always easy, and you’ll have to overcome adversity in life. Chin up, and keep that smile… after all that is the whole purpose of this career! 😉 🦷  A difficult exam that’s designed to weed students out doesn’t erase your hard work, passion, and purpose. Failure only becomes final when you stop trying. And I’m NOT done yet! Next week begins attempt #2 of the DAT. You’re always going to be part of a statistic, and today I’m placed into the 20-30% of applicants who retake the DAT more than once. You’re never truly alone!  Thanks to all the friends, family, and aspiring Dentists that have supported, inspired, and motivated me. 🫶🏼 #DAT #predental #dentalschool #DATBootCamp
